biological_replicate: between 35,500 and 158,000 worms were used for each experiment
technical_replicate: two independent incubations of 5 and 24 h each
experimental_design: C. elegans vs other parasitic nematodes comparison
We compared the miRNA complement of extracellular vesicles released by the free-living nematode Caenorhabditis elegans in culture to that of other adult parasitic nematodes.
factor_value: C. elegans and other adult parasitic nematodes
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
